description: A 35-year-old non-smoker wants to apply for a 20-year, $500,000 term life insurance policy.

nodes.task_description: Gather the applicant's personal and contact information.

expected_outcome.value: Agent accurately collects the applicant's basic details.

nodes.task_description: Ask a series of health and lifestyle questions (e.g., smoking status, major health conditions).

expected_outcome.value: Agent captures all required underwriting questions.

nodes.task_description: Submit the application to underwriting and schedule a required paramedical exam.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully submits the application and schedules the exam for the applicant.
